meaning: adj.外部的,外面的,远离中心的n.(射击)环外命中
examples: He heard a voice in the outer room.
I walked along the outer edge of the track.
The outer skin of the orange is called the "zest."
Approximately 30 percent of the cottonseed's weight is in the hull, or outer covering.
The pandas bite off the hard outer part of the stalks and eat the soft fibres within.
